TAR WG I

Back to overview

[1] IPCC. Climate Change 2001: The Scientific Basis. Contribution of Working Group I to the Third Assessment Report of the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change. Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change, Geneva, Switzerland, 2001.

  address = {Geneva, Switzerland},
  title = {Climate Change 2001: The Scientific Basis. Contribution of Working Group I to the Third Assessment Report of the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change},

Johnson, editors, Climate Change 2001: The Scientific Basis. Contribution of Working Group I to the Third Assessment Report of the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change, book section SPM, pages 1--20. Cambridge University Press, Cambridge, UK, 2001.

Nyenzi, M. Oppenheimer, J. E. Penner, S. Pollonais, T. Stocker, K. E. Trenberth, M. R. Allen, A. P. M. Baede, J. A. Church, D. H. Ehhalt, C. K. Folland, F. Giorgi, J. M. Gregory, J. M. Haywood, J. I.   pages = {769-785}
}
